creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
(Looks related to bug ports/132041: x11/xorg: Broken Intel video driver)

On i386 8.0-current, with intel i845 chipset, with

	Option		"AccelMethod" "UXA"

in device section of xorg.conf I get this error:

	error: [drm:pid1104:i915_irq_emit] *ERROR* i915_irq_emit called
	without lock held

and these 3 lines at the bottom of the Xorg.0.log:

	(WW) intel(0): PRB0_CTL (0x0001f001) indicates ring buffer enabled
	(WW) intel(0): Existing errors found in hardware state.
	_fence_emit_internal: drm_i915_irq_emit: 22

If I don't use UXA I get a warning in the X log file that it must be
enabled for DRI2.

xorg.conf, dmesg, and Xorg.0.log are below.

*******************

e"
	BusID       "PCI:0:2:0"
EndSection

	Device     "Card0"
	Monitor    "Monitor0"
	SubSection "Display"
		Viewport   0 0
		Depth     16
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Viewport   0 0
		Depth     24
	EndSubSection
EndSection
